title: barleria glutinosa
intro: Barleria glutinosa, a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, is commonly known as the sticky barleria or rough barleria. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Barleria glutinosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and the plant is also used in some parts of the world as a traditional remedy for snake bites.
